prompt: A dramatic manga-style action illustration of a chaotic family apartment during a long holiday at home, shown in a wide cinematic interior shot with exaggerated perspective and motion lines. In the foreground right, a tired adult man in a wrinkled white T-shirt and dark pants slumps over a mop handle, head bowed on his arm, looking physically and emotionally exhausted. In the midground left, 1 wild child is captured midair launching off a torn sofa, wearing a loose red shirt and shorts, arms spread wide like a reckless dive, with explosive speed lines radiating behind him. In the center, 1 second child in a blue T-shirt and dark shorts runs forward through the wreckage with one fist raised, full of chaotic energy. In the background right, 1 adult woman with dark hair tied in a messy bun cooks frantically at the stove in an apron, surrounded by steam, splashing food, and towering stacks of dirty bowls and pots. The room is in total disarray: 1 damaged sofa with stuffing flying out, 1 television with a cracked screen, 1 toppled small table, 1 blue mop bucket, scattered trash, broken glass, papers, toys, food debris, and smeared mess all across the wooden floor. A sliding glass door or window in the back is visibly cracked, adding to the sense of destruction. Use gritty inked linework, rough painterly shading, desaturated browns and grays with muted reds and blues, highly detailed clutter, dynamic anatomy, and intense comic-book energy. The mood should contrast the idea of wanting to relax at home with the reality of nonstop domestic chaos, like an over-the-top Japanese manga cover about family exhaustion during vacation.
